# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: MySecureSG
      Description: Security group for allowing SSH, HTTP and HTTPS access from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPCID'

  InboundRuleSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  InboundRuleHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 80
      ToPort: 80
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  InboundRuleHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
